labels.cart_drawer_auto_open: Open cart drawer after add to cart

infos.background_gradient_replaces: Background gradient replaces background where possible.
infos.fonts: The font size, weight, line height, and letter spacing below apply to larger screens.
infos.total_horizontal_padding: Total horizontal padding. The value is split evenly between left and right.
infos.colors_palette: color name and color code should be separated by : and different colors should be separated by , e.g. Red:#ff0000, Rose gold:#B76E79
infos.cart_drawer_auto_open: Automatically open the cart drawer every time a product is added to the cart.
infos.marquee_background_color: Choose the background color behind the scrolling cards.
infos.marquee_item_gap: Each step adds 0.25 rem to the gap between marquee items (for example, 4 = 1 rem).
infos.marquee_text_color: Choose the text color for content inside the marquee.
infos.marquee_vertical_padding: Each step increases the marquee's vertical padding by 0.25 rem (for example, 4 = 1 rem).
infos.reverse_button_order: Swap the position of the quick view and add to cart buttons.
infos.show_product_marquee: Display cards in a continuous scrolling marquee.

image.label: Left Side Image
image.info: Upload a high-resolution contextual image. Fallbacks to dynamic outline if left empty.

button_link.label: Button Destination
button_link.info: Route to redirect customers back from failure routes.

autoplay_speed.label: Auto-play speed (seconds)
autoplay_speed.info: Only applies when auto-play is enabled

text.label: Message
text.default: Save Upto 60% For Your First Order

padding_vertical.label: Vertical padding
padding_vertical.info: Each step increases the marquee's vertical padding by 0.25 rem (for example, 4 = 1 rem).

gap.label: Item gap
gap.info: Each step adds 0.25 rem to the gap between marquee items (for example, 4 = 1 rem).

logo_text.label: Custom logo text
logo_text.info: Leave empty to use store name

cart_drawer_gift_product.label: Cart drawer gift product
cart_drawer_gift_product.info: Shown in the cart drawer as the optional gift upsell.

enable_sticky.label: Enable sticky header
enable_sticky.info: Header sticks to top of page when scrolling.

suggested_searches.label: Suggested searches
suggested_searches.info: Separate each term with a comma.

nav_link_paragraph.content: Type the exact nav menu item name below. Example: if your menu says 'Shop', type Shop or shop here.

nav_link_title.label: Nav link title
nav_link_title.info: Must match the menu item name exactly (case-insensitive).

categories_menu.label: Categories menu
categories_menu.info: Links pointing to collections will show product count automatically.

brands_menu.label: Brands menu
brands_menu.info: Links pointing to collections will show product count automatically.

featured_products.label: Product lists
featured_products.info: Add up to 10 products. Use the slider above to control how many appear.

banner_image.label: Mega banner image
banner_image.info: Recommended image size: 790 x 499px (landscape, ~3:2 ratio). Portrait or square images will be cropped to fit.

quote.label: Quote text
quote.default: "I used to switch up my shoes frequently, but now I only wear these. They match in my wardrobe!"

media_type.label: Media type
media_type.info: Switch between Image and Video — only the relevant pickers below will be used.

mobile_image.label: Mobile Background Image
mobile_image.info: Displayed on screens narrower than 750px. Falls back to desktop image if not set.

description.label: Description
description.default: Discover pieces crafted for those who live with intention. Limited runs, infinite style.

text.label: Text
text.default: Share information about your brand with customers.

text.label: Text
text.default: We think shopping should be all about celebrating your personal style.

tagline.label: Tag line
tagline.default: Limited-time steals. Upgrade your sneaker collection now.

countdown_timer_paragraph.content: The time is set in your store's timezone

first_card_desc.label: Description
first_card_desc.default: Soft padded interior for long-lasting comfort.

second_card_desc.label: Description
second_card_desc.default: Breathable engineered mesh for proper airflow.

third_card_desc.label: Description
third_card_desc.default: Natural cork layer providing adaptive support.

body.label: Paragraph Body Text
body.default: From street to lifestyle, explore collections that move with you.

btn_aria_label.label: Button ARIA Label
btn_aria_label.default: View collections - browse our curated styles

quote.label: Quote
quote.default: From busy city days to slow weekend walks, these sneakers keep up effortlessly. I don't think about comfort anymore — it's just there.

subtitle.label: Subtitle
subtitle.default: Have a question? Contact us, and we'll get back to you within one business day.

footer_logo.label: Footer logo
footer_logo.info: Leave blank to use shop name as text

brand_tagline.label: Brand tagline
brand_tagline.default: Awesome designs for brands that matter!

newsletter_heading.label: Newsletter heading
newsletter_heading.default: Unlock your full potential with 50% off!

copyright_text.label: Copyright text
copyright_text.info: Leave blank to use the default: Copyright © [year] [shop name]

custom_liquid.label: Custom Liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid/HTML code to create advanced customizations.

variant_swatch_mode.label: Color option swatch style
variant_swatch_mode.info: For 'Color' mode, name your option values using CSS color names or hex codes (e.g. #FF0000, red, navy).

subtext.label: Subtext
subtext.default: New drops, exclusive offers, and style inspiration - Straight to your inbox

success_subtext.label: Success subtext
success_subtext.default: Thanks for joining. Use this code at checkout

paragraph.content: This product will only be used when the gift box option is enabled above.

gift_product.label: Gift upsell product
gift_product.info: Select the gift box product to offer as an upsell. Only works when 'Enable gift box' is turned on.

hidden_filters.label: Hidden filter names
hidden_filters.info: Comma-separated list of filter labels to hide (e.g., 'Color, Size')

hidden_filters.label: Hidden filter names
hidden_filters.info: Comma-separated list of filter labels to hide (e.g., 'Color, Size')

section_aria_label.label: Section aria label
section_aria_label.info: Announced to screen readers in place of a visible heading. Keep it short and descriptive.

video_shopify.label: Video
video_shopify.info: Shopify-hosted video. Takes priority over an external URL.

video_url.label: External video URL
video_url.info: Direct link to an .mp4 file. Used only if no Shopify-hosted video is set.

card_link.label: Card link
card_link.info: Optional. Makes the entire card a clickable link.

label.label: Caption text
label.info: Shown at the bottom of the card. Also used as the card's accessible label.

icon.label: Custom icon
icon.info: Leave blank to use the default Instagram icon.

section_aria_label.label: Gallery label
section_aria_label.info: Announced to screen readers in place of a visible heading. Keep it short and descriptive.

layout_direction.label: Reading direction
layout_direction.info: Set to 'Right to left' for Arabic or Hebrew storefronts.

settings.section_image_info: Displayed on tablet and desktop only. Falls back to a placeholder if left empty.
settings.feature_1_desc_default: Shop with confidence with secure checkout.
settings.feature_2_desc_default: Thoughtfully designed products for everyday living.

enable_auto_swap.label: Auto-advance slides
enable_auto_swap.info: Pauses on hover. Disabled automatically when the visitor has reduced-motion turned on.

settings.open_hours_info: Use line breaks to separate days and times.
settings.address_default:
123 Example Street
Sample City, Region 00000
Country

paragraph.content: This section only works on product pages. It will not display on the home page or other pages.

discount_code_header.content: Discount Codes (set random codes in Shopify admin)

discount_code_2.label: Discount code for 2 items
discount_code_2.info: Set a random, non-guessable code in your Shopify admin e.g. X9K2R7M4

discount_code_3.label: Discount code for 3 items
discount_code_3.info: Set a random, non-guessable code in your Shopify admin e.g. P4Q8N1L5

discount_code_4.label: Discount code for 4 items
discount_code_4.info: Set a random, non-guessable code in your Shopify admin e.g. M7J3T6W2

discount_code_5.label: Discount code for 5 items
discount_code_5.info: Set a random, non-guessable code in your Shopify admin e.g. Z5B9R2K8

0.question: What materials are used in your footwear?
0.answer: Our footwear is crafted using carefully selected materials chosen for comfort, durability, and everyday wear.

2.question: Can I return or exchange my order?

3.question: Are your products covered by a warranty?

4.question: Can I modify or cancel my order?

paragraphs.more_platforms_hint: Add URL to activate additional platforms.
paragraphs.social_links_hint: Add URL to show. Leave blank to hide.
